name: @smithy-hono/test-kit
description: Testing toolkit for smithy-hono services. Drive the GENERATED typed client against your router/pipeline in-process (no network): unit harness (router + stand-in principal), integration harness (full security pipeline + in-memory stores), auth helpers (loginAs cookie+CSRF, asService HMAC signing), builders, runner-agnostic assertions, and an in-memory MCP client. Web-standard only (ARCH-01).
